query:
INSERT INTO release_notes (title, summary, body, versionLabel, category, active, createdByUserId)
SELECT
  'Community Care catch-up: recent app changes',
  'A catch-up note for recent edits that should have been communicated as an in-game acknowledgement popup.',
  'Community Care note: a few visible improvements were made before they were properly explained here. That was a communication miss, so this catch-up popup now records them clearly.\n\nWhat changed: mobile navigation now supports swipe movement between sections with smoother transitions; boost tokens on the Board are tucked into a tappable drawer so the leaderboard is easier to read; the mobile top-three podium was redesigned as a horizontal stepped podium with rank-specific motion; and the Proof section design direction was reviewed so future proof posts can keep person, media, teaching, and deep thought together instead of losing context.\n\nWhat you need to do: nothing is required except acknowledging this note. Going forward, visible edits should be posted through this Community Care / patch-note popup so participants know what changed and why.',
  'Care catch-up 2026-05-10',
  'community_care',
  true,
  (SELECT id FROM users WHERE role = 'admin' ORDER BY id LIMIT 1)
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM release_notes WHERE versionLabel = 'Care catch-up 2026-05-10' AND category = 'community_care'
);
